raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es dohſcbu mannu
Barru juhſo Widdû / un darri-
ſchu/ ka juhs mannôs Likſnumôs
ſtaigafeet/ nn mannas Teefas
ſargafeet un darrisfeet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un juhs dſihwoſeet tai
Semmê / ko es juhsu Tehweem
dewis eſmu / un juhs buhſeet
man par Laudim/un es buhſcbu
juhs par Deewu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es atpeſtischu juhs no
wiſſahm juhsu Neſchkikſtibahm/
un aizinaſchu to Labbibu/ un
wairoſchu to/ un ne likſchu us
juhs ne kahou Baddu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es wairoſchu tohs
Kohku Augkus/ un ta Tihruima
Augumu/ ka juhs Badda deht
ne tohpat wairs ſtarp teem Pa-
ganeem mehditi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad peeminneſeet juhs
juhsus taunus Zelfus/ un juhsus
nelabbus Darbus/un juhs buhs
weena Apnikſchana no juhs
paſcheem pahr juhſeem Nosee-
gumeem/ un pahr juhsahm Ne-
gantibahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es to ne darru juhſu
deht/ ſakka tas Klings KUNgS:
Lat tas juhs irr paſihſtams /
launejeetees/ un tohpeet Kannâ
juhsu Zelfu deht/ juhs no Isra-
etâ Namma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta ſakka tas Klings
KUNgS: Tai Deena/ kad es
juhs ſchikſtischu no wiſſahm
juhsu Neſchkikſtibahm/ tad lik-
ſchu es tohs. Pilsfahtus eedsih-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta iſpohſtita Semme
taps atkat apkohta tai Weeta/
ka ta pohſta bija preekſch itkatra
Azzim/ kas zaur ees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee ſazzihg : Schi
Semme/ kas pohſta bija/irr tap-
pu fi ka weens Preeka-Dahrs/ un
tee tukſchi un pohſtiti un iſpoh-
ſtiti Bilsfahti irr ſipri/ un tohp
eedsihwott.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fajuttihs tee Baga-
ni/ kas apkahrt juhs irr utliizi-
nati/ ka es tas KUNgS uſtai-
fu tahs pohſtitas Weetas / un
apdehſtu kas iſpohſtihts irr/ Es
tas KUNgS eſmu to runnajs/
un darriſchu to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta ſakka tas Klings
KUNgS: Es likſchohs atka
waizatees no ta Israeta Mann-
ma/ ka es teem parahdohs/ es
wairoſchu tohs ar Zilwekeem ka
gannamu Pulku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Itt ka tahs fwehtas Awis/
ca Jerufalemes Awis ſawôs ee-
zeltos Swehtkos/ ta buhs tahs
tukſchas Weetas pilnas no Zil-
wekeem ka gannams Bulks/ un
tee fajuttihs/ ka es tas Klings
eſmu.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
